title: VANDR-114 Elderly People Who Are Cared For In Volunteer Extracurricular Classes Smell Aggravated Smell Of Saliva Kisses By Students
overview: "This is also a nursing care..." The target is girls who have come to care for the elderly in the community as part of their extracurricular classes at school. Old men pretending to be a physical examination and licking the girls' bodies until they become stubborn. The innocent girls had no choice but to obediently obey the act filled with malice and stench. "My sperm is as good as dead."
